name: NCHS - VSRR Quarterly provisional estimates for selected indicators of mortality
description: Provisional estimates of death rates. Estimates are presented for each of the 15 leading causes of death plus estimates for deaths attributed to drug overdose, falls (for persons aged 65 and over), human immunodeficiency virus (HIV) disease, homicide, and firearms-related deaths.

top.item: Pneumonitis due to solids and liquids

Data Quality.Suggested Citation: Ahmad FB, Cisewski JA. Quarterly provisional estimates for selected indicators of mortality, [date range]. National Center for Health Statistics. National Vital Statistics System, Vital Statistics Rapid Release Program. [year]. DOI: https://dx.doi.org/10.15620/cdc/20250305012

metadata.rowLabel: Mortality rate by state, rate type, year and quarter, and cause of death
